hooks.command: if [ ! -f /tmp/mybot-state-loaded ]; then echo '[STARTUP] Read ~/myproject/bot-state.md FIRST to restore your working memory before replying.'; touch /tmp/mybot-state-loaded; fi

echo '[STATE REMINDER] You just sent a Telegram reply. If this interaction involved any decisions, action items, commitments, or important context — update ~/myproject/bot-state.md NOW before doing anything else.'
